add_subdirectory(rgfw)

set(SPIRV_REFLECT_EXECUTABLE OFF)
set(SPIRV_REFLECT_STATIC_LIB ON)
set(SPIRV_REFLECT_BUILD_TESTS OFF)
set(SPIRV_REFLECT_ENABLE_ASSERTS ON)
set(SPIRV_REFLECT_ENABLE_ASAN OFF)
set(SPIRV_REFLECT_INSTALL OFF)
add_subdirectory(spirv-reflect)

set(ASSIMP_BUILD_TESTS OFF)
set(ASSIMP_INSTALL OFF)
set(ASSIMP_INSTALL_PDB OFF)
set(ASSIMP_BUILD_ALL_EXPORTERS_BY_DEFAULT OFF)
set(ASSIMP_BUILD_ALL_IMPORTERS_BY_DEFAULT OFF)
set(ASSIMP_BUILD_FBX_IMPORTER ON)
set(ASSIMP_BUILD_GLTF_IMPORTER ON)
add_subdirectory(assimp)

add_subdirectory(stb)

add_library(luma-imgui STATIC imgui/imgui.cpp imgui/imgui_draw.cpp imgui/imgui_tables.cpp imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp)
add_library(luma::imgui ALIAS luma-imgui)
target_include_directories(luma-imgui PUBLIC imgui imgui/backends)
set_target_properties(luma-imgui PROPERTIES CXX_STANDARD 17)
if(LUMA_ENGINE_BUILD_VULKAN)
    target_link_libraries(luma-imgui PRIVATE Vulkan::volk)
    target_sources(luma-imgui PRIVATE imgui/backends/imgui_impl_vulkan.cpp)
    target_compile_definitions(luma-imgui PRIVATE IMGUI_IMPL_VULKAN_USE_VOLK IMGUI_IMPL_VULKAN_VOLK_FILENAME=<Volk/volk.h>)
endif ()
